clusters.justification: These terms share macroscopic co-activation in cortico-limbic circuitry responsible for evaluating the valence of stimuli, experiencing feelings, and regulating internal physiological states.
These concepts map onto frontostriatal and mesolimbic networks dedicated to computing expected subjective utility, processing incentives, and guiding goal-directed behavior.
These terms co-activate within the default mode network, which supports internally-directed thought, self-referential processing, and modeling the abstract subjective states of oneself and others.
